About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 1972, Bharat Coking Coal Limited (BCCL) is engaged in the production of coking coal, non-coking coal, and washed coal.
[1]
Key Points
Business Profile
[1]
BCCL is engaged in mining, beneficiation (washing), and supply of coking coal, non-coking coal and washed coal, catering mainly to the steel and power sectors. It operates in the Jharia (Jharkhand) and Raniganj (West Bengal) coalfields and holds some of the largest prime coking coal reserves in the country.
